violations.claim: VIOLATION: the catch absorbs ALL exceptions from readFileSync + parser.parse + findAll.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 94
; VIOLATION: the catch absorbs ALL exceptions from readFileSync + parser.parse + findAll.
; Comment says "unreadable files" but a readable file that crashes the parser is also silently dropped.
(declare-const file_readable Int)    ; 1 = readFileSync succeeded
(declare-const parse_ok Int)         ; 1 = parser.parse succeeded
(declare-const exception_thrown Int) ; 1 = any exception in try block
(declare-const counted_skipped Int)  ; 1 = file silently dropped by catch
; Code transition: file IS readable (readFileSync succeeds)
(assert (= file_readable 1))
; Code transition: parser.parse THROWS (e.g., tree-sitter internal error on malformed AST)
(assert (= parse_ok 0))
(assert (= exception_thrown 1))
; Code transition: catch catches all exceptions equally
(assert (=> (= exception_thrown 1) (= counted_skipped 1)))
; Violation: a readable-but-parse-crashing file is labelled "unreadable" by the comment
(assert (= file_readable 1))
(assert (= counted_skipped 1))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: VIOLATION: no variable tracks how many files were silently dropped.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 94
; VIOLATION: no variable tracks how many files were silently dropped.
; The line-97 log reports totals with no way to signal coverage gaps.
(declare-const total_ts_files Int)
(declare-const skipped_count Int)
(declare-const skipped_tracked Int)  ; 1 = a counter exists for skipped files, 0 = no counter
; Code transition: total_ts_files > 0 (git ls-files found TypeScript files)
(assert (> total_ts_files 0))
; Code transition: some files throw inside try and are caught
(assert (> skipped_count 0))
(assert (<= skipped_count total_ts_files))
; Code transition: catch block has no increment of any skipped-file counter
(assert (= skipped_tracked 0))
; Violation: skipped files are permanently invisible; line 97 totalSignals is an undercount
(assert (> skipped_count 0))
(assert (= skipped_tracked 0))
(check-sat)
